title: Agaman
subTitle: Binu, a mischievous boy, is forced to leave his village and get separated from Chandra. Binu finds shelter in a theatre group but faces many ups and downs in life before he finally returns home.

title: Priyojon
subTitle: Jamuna's daughter Radha is in love with Amol but no one has a clue about their affair. Jamuna fixes Radha's marriage with another boy and realizes later that she is in love with Amol.

title: Subharatri
subTitle: Harimati, a poor farmer, and her family leave no stone unturned to make ends meet. However, as they face one challenge after another, the family's unity is tested.

title: Patanjali Yog - By Yogrishi Swami Ramdev
subTitle: Baba Ramdev emphasises the importance of yoga and demonstrates various asanas and breathing exercises that enable one to lead a healthy and stress-free life.

title: Esho Maa Lakshmi
subTitle: A tale of Goddess Lakshmi that describes her divine origin, celestial beauty, and role as the bestower of wealth and prosperity in Hindu mythology.

title: Mama Bhagne
subTitle: Raja, a lazy man, gets married to Payel under the assumption that she is from a wealthy family. However, he is shocked to learn that Payel's father is a gardener.

title: Agnipath
subTitle: Sujay, Ajay and Bijay are three siblings who share a close bond and can go to any length to protect each other. However, when Sujay is killed by his own boss, Bijay sets out to exact revenge.

title: Baba Keno Chakar
subTitle: When Rajnarayan asks his son to help out with the expenses for his sister's wedding, he refuses. As a result, he is forced to go from pillar to post to make ends meet.

title: Geet Sangeet
subTitle: Abandoning his affluent background, a man chases his musical dreams. However, he finds himself employed as a driver and becomes smitten with his boss's daughter.

title: Chowdhury Paribar
subTitle: A man expends all his efforts to keep his family together. However, his wife and older brother thwart his plans by creating rifts within the family.

title: Mone Mone
subTitle: Shakuntala strives to support her family after her father's untimely death. Later, a man falls in love with her and makes her a promise.

title: Takkar

title: Bhalobasi Tomake
subTitle: With a temper that's always on the verge of boiling over, a young man's life is transformed in an instant when he meets a woman who brings out the best in him.

title: Satarupa
subTitle: Dr. Rupa unintentionally causes Shatadal's memory loss, leading him to see her as his only kin. Later, they fall for each other but when his past returns, he forgets her.

title: Agni Trishna
subTitle: Avijit, who was once a famous doctor, became mentally unstable after losing his beloved Sheela. This has an adverse effect on Koushik and Tripti, Avijit's doctors, who are also lovers.

title: Neoti
subTitle: Umanath and Sashinath are stepbrothers who have different personalities and perspectives on life. Haranath, a priest, instigates hatred in their families to fulfil his personal evil agenda.

title: Bisorjon

title: Chaowa Pawa
subTitle: Best friends Arun and Deb promise to get married on the same day but the former gets into an accident. When he asks to see his fiance for the last time, Deb sacrifices his love to fulfil the wish.

title: Matir Manush
subTitle: After Meeting With An Accident, Payel Falls In Love With A Man. Things Turn When Her Father Disapproves Of Their Relationship.

title: Mahajan
subTitle: A powerful landowner conducts his business and lives his life with cruelty. However, various circumstances influence him to change his nature and tactics over time.

title: Ajker Santan
subTitle: Chandranath, a factory worker, dies trying to fund his daughter Rani's wedding. After his death, his biological children mistreat his family, while his adopted son Aninda shows true loyalty.

title: 100 E Ek Show
subTitle: Leading figures from the entertainment industry put on captivating shows to celebrate and commemorate the centenary of Bengali cinema.

title: Force
subTitle: Arjun, an honest police officer, is harsh on criminals and has a cold demeanour towards people. However, he shares a loving relationship with his son who has autism.
